notes: Pose and orientation roughly match the photo but the silhouette is a noisy edge-trace with distorted mantle proportions and no proper anatomical detail.
specific_issues: mantle silhouette is elongated and pointed like a fish/kite rather than the rounded Loligo posterior in the photo
fin outline is jagged and discontinuous, not a clean continuous curve
no almond-shaped eye with filled pupil rendered at the head
no ring suckers drawn along the arms
stipple is scattered noise rather than concentrated chromatophore fields matching the photo
outline shows raster edge-detection artifacts (broken segments, double lines, dotted edges) instead of single-weight ink
arms read as flat tapered blades without the curling tentacle clubs visible in the photo
small spurious circles and marks scattered across the body resemble trace clutter rather than scientific stipple
